titleStmt.title: SII 41.97: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 97. (A.R. No. 96 of 1905.) Kōyil-Māriyūr, Mudukulattur Taluk, Ramnad District. On the south wall of the central shrine in the Pushpavanesvara temple at Kōyil-Māriyūr.

p.hi: Pāṇḍya. Māṟavarman Sundara-pāṇḍya II, Year 4+2 = 1244 A.D.

summary.p: Records the remission of taxes on several pieces of land belonging to the temple of Tirupūventīśvam-uḍaiyār. The lands were lying in Churavaranēri and another village in Ēḻūr-chembināḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī pūma
laṟ tiruvum poru
jaya maṭantaiyum
tāmaraik kuvimulai ja
yappuyattiruppa vetanā
vil veṉṉitaṭ tā
maraik kātalmātu
kaviṉ peṟattiḷaippa
veṇṭirai Uṭuttuti
ṇṭiṇi kiṭakkait tiru
nilamaṭantai Urimaiyiṟṟiḷai
ppac camaiya nitiyun tarumamun ta
ḻaippa Imaiyavar viḻākkoṭi
iṭantoṟu meṭuppak karuṅkali
kaṉal keṭa kaṭavuḷ vetiyar Arun
toḻil veḻvic ceṅkaṉal vaḷarac curu
tiyun tamiḻun tolvaḷaṅkulava poruti
ṟalāḻi pūtalañ cūḻ
mummata nāṟkoṭṭa rā
koṟṟat teṇṭicai yāṉai
ṟi kaṇṭanāṭu mem
kocalan tu
ñ coṉaka mutalā vitimuṟai tikaḻa vevveṟu mutunila
k kiḻamaiyiṉ muṭipuṉai ventaṟ koru tani ṉeṉṟu
laketta tirumuṭi cūṭicceṅkoloccik koṟṟattāḷ kuḷir ku
ṭai niḻaṟkaṟṟaik kavari kāvalar vica miṭaikatir navamaṇi virasimhā
saṉattuṭaṉ muṭi cūṭi Uyar kulattiruveṉap paṅkayamalaṟ karaṅku
vittup pāttivar maṅkayar tiraṇṭuvaṇaṅkuñ ceṉṉi
ccuṭaroḷi maulic cuṭarmaṇi meliṭac civanta viṇaimalar ciṟaṭi
k kaṉaka matukaraṅ kamalameṉṟaṇukum Ulakamuḻutuṭaiyāroṭum
viṟṟiruntaruḷiya śrīkomāṟa paṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīsundarapā
ṇdhyadevaṟku yāṇṭu nālāvati ṉetirāmāṇṭi ṉetirāmāṇṭu prasādañ
ceytaruḷiya tirumukappaṭi §tribhuvaṉaccakkaravatti koneriṉmai koṇṭāṉ
por veṭkaipaṭṭaṉattu nāṟpat
teṇṇāyiravaṉitaṉ tirupūven=tiśvaramuṭaiyār koyiṟ śiva
brāhmaṇarkkum tevakaṉmikkum Ittevaṟt tiruppaṭimāṟṟuḷḷi
ṭṭu veṇṭu nivantaṅkaḷukku Eḻūr cempināṭṭu curavaṉerikkā
raṇavar pakkalum maṅkalattuk kāraṇavarpakkaluṅ
ka vilaikoṇṭiv vi
lai Ōlaippaṭi Aṉu
bhavittup pOtu
kiṟa kuḷaṅkaḷ nāṉ
kellaikkuṭpaṭṭa ni
r nilamum karuñcey pu
ṉ ceyyum nattamum
toṭṭamum kuḷamum kuḷa
pparippum maṟṟum Ep
peyar paṭṭaṉavum Uṭpaṭa
nilam nālāvatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭi
ṉetirāmāṇṭu mutal kaṭamaiyu
m Antarāyamum taruvatāṉa Accum
kāriyavārācciyum viṉiōkamum veṭ
ṭipāṭṭamum pañcupili cantivikkirakap
peṟum taṟiyiṟai cekkiṟaiyum
Eppeyarpaṭṭaṉa
vaṉērik kāraṇava
ṅkuḷattu
ttāl vilaikoṇṭa vilai Ōlaippaṭi [ Aṉubhavittu]
potukiṟa kuḷaṅkaḷ nāṉ kellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nīr ni
lamum karuñcey puṉceyyum nattamun toṭṭamum kuḷa
mum kuḷapparippum maṟṟum Eppeyarpaṭṭaṉavum Uṭpaṭa ni
lam Ivvāṇṭu mutal kaṭamaiyum Antarāyamum taruva
tāṉa Accum kāriyavārācciyum viṉiōkamum veṭṭi pā
ṭṭamum pañcupili canti vikkirakappeṟum taṟiyiṟai cekki
ṟai taṭṭoḷir pāṭṭamum maṟṟum Eppeyarpaṭṭaṉavum Uṭ
paṭat tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭacco
ka maṅkalattuk ku
ḷattāḻvāṉ Āṇ
ṭapirāṉ Āticcate
vaṉāṉa pāṇṭiya rāja
ṉ Eḻuttu §ivai ce
vvintikai nāṭṭuc cakka
rapāṇinallūrraiya
ṉ makaṉāṉa vayiralairāya
ṉ Eḻuttu komāṟa
panmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakkara
vattikaḷ śrī sundarapāṇdhyade
vaṟku yāṇṭu nālāvatiṉ Etirāmā
ṇṭiṉetirāmāṇṭu Iṭai
nāṭṭu k
paṭṭiṉa caturvvetimaṅ
porveṭkai paṭṭaṉattu nāṟpat
teṇāyiravaṉitaṉ tiruppū venti
śvaramuṭaiya nāyiṉāṟ
viṟṟukkārvuṭai tēvatāṉamāka
Aṉubhavittup pōtukiṟa
ṉ campanta nallūr
toṇṭa
koṇṭa campaṭṭi mevaṉum citarappi
ḷḷaiyum
sātañ ceytirumukappaṭi I
kku
marakkālāl patiṉañcu
koṇṭa mukkalanellum
ṇṭa nilattukku māttāl Antarāya
Araimāvum cuṭuceṅkāṭṭup pullukkuḷḷi mu
vi nīkki māttāl Aḻai
Irupatukācum Iṟuppārākavum
viḷainta nilattukku
koṉṟuṅ kaṭamaiyil Oṉṟu pāti Iṟup
patākavum viḷainta nilattukku
ttāl kalaṅkoḷvatākavum I
v vempalkaḷil kuṭiyiruntavarkaḷ
talai Oppu nāṟpatukācu Iṟuppa
tākavum kaṭamaik kaṭṭiṉamutal pa
ṇṭāra Aṟaivācalile Eṭutti cev
vanta perumāṉeṉkiṟa marakkālāle
Aḷappārākavum Ippaṭi kaṭamai ca
ntrāditavaṟ celvatāka
prasādañ ceytaruḷiya tirumukappaṭi
kallil veṭṭiṉaṉeṉ paḻavūr nāṟpa
tteṇṇāyiravaṉ taṉattu Uṭaiya
r muṉaivali śvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyi
l śilpācāyarma svavidhyādharannam
piyāṉa tramokya sundaraācā
ryyasya lekhyam ..§
Digital edition of SII 41.97 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
